message:
feat(core): add model-checking harness and counterexample pipeline types (ft-2p9cb.5.2.1)

E2 types: TraceStep, TraceAction (5 variants), Counterexample,
ExplorationStrategy (BFS/Random/Guided), ModelCheckerConfig,
ModelCheckerSnapshot, ModelCheckVerdict (NoViolation/ViolationsFound/
Incomplete), ModelChecker with step/new_trace/should_stop/verdict,
ModelCheckerDegradation, ModelCheckerLogEntry. 22 unit tests (647 total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
